creator: nc@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Hans Petter Selasky from comment #21)

Thank you so much. The output is:

(gdb) info line *(void *)(psmintr+0x163)
Line 2954 of "/usr/src/sys/dev/atkbdc/psm.c"
   starts at address 0xffffffff80f3aad2 <psmintr+338>
   and ends at 0xffffffff80f3aae7 <psmintr+359>.
